companions.name: creative-production
companions.purpose: Broader creative exploration workflows when installed

guardrails: Positioning and commercial strategy must be supplied or settled upstream.
Source assets required for an edit must be present before editing begins.
A generated series is accepted only against the approved brand brief and references.

routing_cases.prompt: Turn approved business context into a visual decision brief.
Choose which image model and production mode fit this visual job.
Invent the missing positioning and make the brand claims for me.
routing_cases.evidence_contains: Do not invent positioning or brand claims
